title: senna pachyrrhiza
intro: Senna pachyrrhiza, also known as the yellow cassia, is a plant species belonging to the legume family that is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a laxative due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of senna pachyrrhiza include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote regular bowel movements. Senna pachyrrhiza can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and alleviate constipation.
